/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/compare_e_power_control.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/compare_e_power_control.dir/compare/compare_e_power_control.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_e_power_control.dir/src/ecm.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_e_power_control.dir/src/ekf.c.o CMakeFiles/compare_e_power_control.dir/src/arrhenius.c.o -o compare_e_power_control  -lm
